Itemized  ·  Procedures  ·  Total hip replacement  ·  California

Total hip replacement cost in California.

Cash-pay range for total hip replacement across 37 hospitals in California: $98 to $50,861. CPT code 27130. Pulled from each hospital's federally-mandated price transparency file.

Cheapest in California
$98
Adventist Health Glendale
Glendale, CA
vs.

$50,861
UC San Diego Health
San Diego, CA

Data sources: CMS Hospital Price Transparency rule (45 CFR 180.50). CMS Hospital Care Compare (xubh-q36u). CMS HCAHPS patient survey (dgck-syfz). Last refresh: 2026-04-27.
A consumer reading of CMS-mandated MRF data. Not medical or financial advice. Itemized · itemized.health
